steps.title: Follow the tradition clue
steps.content: Although the literature is described as heterogeneous, the evidence after the colon links works by modern writers to traditional Kanaka Maoli stories. The blank must describe themes carrying forward across time.

steps.title: Reject unrelated qualities
steps.content: A means newness or departure from tradition. C means delicacy or indirectness. D means refinement or complexity. None describes a connection between past and present themes. The word for persistence across time matches the evidence. The answer is B.
